title: Tarrac
overview: Aoife Ni Bhraoin returns home to help her father Brendan ‘The Bear’ O’Briain in his recovery from a heart attack.  During this time, Aoife faces the grief of her mother that she hasn’t dealt with until now.  Aoife reacquaints with a group of rowers and this all-female team, who against the odds, take on a high stakes Naomhóg rowing competition.
